signals.headline: US Congress Set to Vote Wednesday on War Powers Resolution for Trump's Iran Strikes | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US Congress Set to Vote Wednesday on War Powers Resolution for Trump's Iran Strikes | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Republican-controlled Congress is scheduled for a vote today on a war powers resolution requiring approval for further US military actions against Iran, following Trump's surprise strikes on Saturday; the measure faces steep odds of passage and a likely veto.[3]  
This could shift pr

signals.headline: Trump Signals Iran War 'Very Close to Over'; In-Principle Agreement to Extend Ceasefire Beyond April 22 | YES | HIGH con
signals.raw: Trump Signals Iran War 'Very Close to Over'; In-Principle Agreement to Extend Ceasefire Beyond April 22 | YES | HIGH confidence**[1][2][3]
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?
US x Iran permanent peace deal by April 22, 2026?
Trump announces end of military operations against Iran by A

signals.headline: **Key Confirmation**: President Trump stated the war is "very close to over," citing Iran's willingness for talks; regio
signals.raw: **Key Confirmation**: President Trump stated the war is "very close to over," citing Iran's willingness for talks; regional officials report a US-Iran "in principle agreement" to extend the current two-week ceasefire (ending ~April 22) for further negotiations, possibly in Islamabad within days.[1][2][3]
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?
US x Iran permanent peace deal by April 22, 2026?
Trump announces end of military operations against Iran by A

signals.headline: **Supporting Details**: US naval blockade of Hormuz continues but Iranian tankers have broken through; first-round talks
signals.raw: **Supporting Details**: US naval blockade of Hormuz continues but Iranian tankers have broken through; first-round talks collapsed over Iran's refusal to abandon nuclear program, yet second round is anticipated amid de-escalation signals.[1][2][3][5]

signals.headline: VP Vance in Pakistan for High-Stakes Iran Peace Talks | NO**
signals.raw:
VP Vance in Pakistan for High-Stakes Iran Peace Talks | NO**  
Vice President JD Vance arrived in Pakistan on April 11 with negotiators Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner to meet Iranian officials, but no new confirmations, announcements, or resolutions reported today.[1]
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?
US x Iran permanent peace deal by April 22, 2026?
US x Iran diplomatic meeting by April 18, 2026?

signals.headline: Leaked Audio Claims Trump-Vance Blocked India-US Trade Deal | NO**
signals.raw:
Leaked Audio Claims Trump-Vance Blocked India-US Trade Deal | NO**  
Leaked audio alleges Trump, Vance, and others stalled the US-India trade deal, tied to India's Republic Day (January 26), with no updates today.[2]  
No mentions of All India Trinamool Congress or White House announcements linking these terms in breaking news.[1][2][3]
matched_markets: Will the All India Trinamool Congress (AITC) win the most seats in the 2026 West

signals.headline: **Prediction Market Impact**: This diplomatic progress and ceasefire extension could shift markets toward de-escalation
signals.raw: **Prediction Market Impact**: This diplomatic progress and ceasefire extension could shift markets toward de-escalation bets (e.g., lower oil prices, reduced war risk), as it moves beyond stalled talks reported days ago.[1][2][3]
